title: Generic Glossary
description: Universal glossary schema supporting multiple glossary types (business, regulatory, etc.) without information loss. Accommodates varying stat structures and optional fields across data sources.

name.description: Identifier name for the glossary (e.g., insignia_bim_business_glossary, apra_regulatory_glossary)

description.description: Human-readable description of the glossary purpose and scope

source_file.description: Optional source file location or identifier

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the glossary was generated

stats.description: Optional statistics object; structure varies by glossary type. May contain: original_rows, unique_terms, duplicates_removed (business glossary) or total_terms, regulatory_standards, domains (regulatory glossary)

terms.description: Array of glossary terms with metadata

full_name.description: Full formal name of the term

name.description: Short or common name for the term (may be abbreviation)

status.description: Current status of the term (Approved, Proposed, Draft, Archived, etc.)

domain.description: Domain classification (e.g., Business Glossary, APRA Regulatory Glossary)

community.description: Community or organizational unit responsible for the term

domain_type.description: Type of domain (e.g., Glossary, Data Domain)

asset_type.description: Type of asset (e.g., Business Term, Regulatory Term)

source_sheet.description: Source sheet or document where term is defined (e.g., Glossary sheet, SRS 550.0)

related_data_domains.description: Array of related data domains or regulatory areas

relates_to_full_name.description: Full name of the related domain

relates_to_asset_type.description: Asset type of the related domain

relates_to_domain_type.description: Domain type of the related domain

relates_to_domain.description: Domain name of the related entity

relates_to_domain_id.description: Domain ID of the related entity

relates_to_asset_id.description: Asset ID of the related entity
